CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Continued To Oct-02-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Joinder Of Defendant Data Realty Holdings Corp, A Delaware Corporation, In Defendant Prime Data Centers Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Jun-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
William C. Wilka, Esq., Tel. 415.710.6834, appearing for plaintiff Jeff Barber;
Michael Hopkins, Tel. 916.321.4444, appearing for defendant Prime Data Centers, LLC and Nicholas Laag.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT DATA REALTY HOLDINGS CORP'S Joinder In Defendant Prime Data Centers' Motion To Transfer Venue.

The matter is contested. Argument is held. At the conclusion of argument, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Defendant Data Realty Holdings Corp.'s joinder in motion to transfer venue is granted.

(See Word minutes for the complete ruling.)

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Loo. (301/RCE)

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jun-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
William C. Wilka, Esq., Tel. 415.710.6834, appearing for plaintiff Jeff Barber;
Michael Hopkins, Tel. 916.321.4444, appearing for defendant Prime Data Centers, LLC and Nicholas Laag.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT PRIME DATA CENTERS, LLC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER.

The matter is contested. Argument is held. At the conclusion of argument, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Defendant Prime Data Centers, LLC's ("Prime") motion to transfer venue is granted.

(See Word minutes for the complete ruling.)

The prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order that states verbatim the substantive protion of the tentative ruling and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Loo. (301/RCE)
